name: Scrape Bartow County Leads



on:

  schedule:

    - cron: '0 8 * * *'

  workflow_dispatch:



jobs:

  scrape:

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:

      - name: Checkout repo

        uses: actions/checkout@v3



      - name: Set up Python

        uses: actions/setup-python@v4

        with:

          python-version: '3.11'



      - name: Install dependencies

        run: pip install requests beautifulsoup4



      - name: Run scraper

        run: python scraper/fetch.py



      - name: Commit results

        run: |

          git config user.name "github-actions"

          git config user.email "github-actions@github.com"

          git add dashboard/records.json

          git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "Update leads $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)"

          git push
